common.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist on anti-yt.

about.metaDescription: Learn how anti-yt helps you break free from YouTube's algorithm with subscription-only feeds, daily time caps, and screen time analytics.

hero.description: anti-yt is a free service that shows only videos from channels you subscribe to, and lets you manage your own screen time.

statement.heading: Is YouTube stealing your time?
statement.body1: We believe the recommendation algorithm is the main reason people get hooked on YouTube. We only surface videos from channels you've allowed.
statement.body2: Put YouTube to more meaningful use.

feed.title: Don't get pulled in by recommendations
feed.body: Only the channels you've subscribed to show up as recommendations. No more endless scrolling that drains your time.

time.title: Cap your daily screen time
time.body: Restrict both the hours you can watch and your daily limit. No more breaks that quietly turn into hours.

analytics.title: Look back on your viewing time
analytics.body: Visualize a full week of viewing data. Look back on your past behavior and reflect on how you've been spending your time.

finalCta.description: Begin a viewing experience designed on your own terms for free

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service for anti-yt — the rights, obligations, prohibited conduct, and disclaimers that apply when you use the Service.
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (hereinafter, the "Terms") set out the conditions for using the various services provided by anti-yt (hereinafter, the "Service"). Registered users (hereinafter, "Users") shall use the Service in accordance with these Terms.

application.title: Scope of Application
application.body:
These Terms apply to all relationships between Users and the Service concerning the use of the Service.
In addition to these Terms, the Service may establish various rules and provisions regarding use of the Service (hereinafter, "Individual Provisions"). Regardless of their name, these Individual Provisions shall constitute a part of these Terms.
Where the provisions of these Terms conflict with those of the Individual Provisions, the Individual Provisions shall prevail unless otherwise stated therein.

registration.title: Registration

account.title: Account Management
account.body:
Users shall appropriately manage, at their own responsibility, their Service account and the Google account used for authentication.
Under no circumstances may a User transfer, lend, or share their account with any third party.
The User shall bear responsibility for any damage arising from inadequate management of the account, errors in use, or use by a third party, and the Service shall bear no responsibility whatsoever.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Matters
prohibited.body: In using the Service, Users shall not engage in any of the following acts:
items: Acts that violate laws and regulations or public order and morals
Acts related to criminal conduct
Acts that infringe the copyrights, trademarks, or other intellectual property rights contained in the Service
Acts that destroy or interfere with the functions of the servers or networks of the Service, other Users, or third parties
Commercially exploiting information obtained through the Service
Acts that may interfere with the operation of the Service
Unauthorized access or attempts thereof
Collecting or accumulating the personal information of other Users
Using the Service for improper purposes
Acts that cause disadvantage, damage, or discomfort to other Users of the Service or to third parties
Impersonating another User
Directly or indirectly providing benefits to antisocial forces
Acts that attempt to circumvent or disable the viewing limits or other technical restrictions of the Service
Any other acts that the Service deems inappropriate

suspension.title: Suspension of the Service

restriction.title: Usage Restrictions and Deregistration

withdrawal.title: Withdrawal
withdrawal.body: Users may withdraw from the Service through the withdrawal procedure prescribed by the Service. The handling of a User's information after withdrawal shall be governed by the separately established Privacy Policy.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties and Limitation of Liability
disclaimer.body:
The Service does not expressly or impliedly warrant that the Service is free from de facto or legal defects (including defects relating to safety, reliability, accuracy, completeness, effectiveness, fitness for a particular purpose, and security, as well as errors, bugs, and infringements of rights).
The Service displays videos and other content provided by YouTube, and the Service bears no responsibility whatsoever for the content of videos or other materials displayed through the Service.
The Service shall bear no responsibility whatsoever for any damage caused to Users arising from the Service, except in cases of the Service's willful misconduct or gross negligence.

serviceChange.title: Changes to the Service
serviceChange.body: The Service may change, add to, or discontinue the content of the Service upon prior notice to Users, and Users shall consent thereto.

termsChange.title: Changes to These Terms
termsChange.body: The Service may change these Terms at any time without notice to Users when it deems necessary. If a User begins using the Service after the revision of these Terms, that User shall be deemed to have agreed to the revised Terms.

personalInfo.title: Handling of Personal Information
personalInfo.body: The Service shall appropriately handle personal information obtained through use of the Service in accordance with the Service's "Privacy Policy."

notification.title: Notice and Contact
notification.body: Notices or communications between Users and the Service shall be made in the manner prescribed by the Service. Unless the User submits a change in accordance with a method separately prescribed by the Service, the Service shall regard the currently registered contact information as valid and contact the User accordingly, and such notice or communication shall be deemed to have reached the User at the time of dispatch.

assignment.title: Prohibition of Assignment of Rights and Obligations
assignment.body: Users may not assign or pledge as collateral their contractual status or any rights or obligations under these Terms to a third party without the prior written consent of the Service.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLaw.body:
These Terms shall be interpreted in accordance with the laws of Japan.
In the event of a dispute concerning the Service, the court having jurisdiction over the location of the Service's operator shall have exclusive agreed jurisdiction.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for anti-yt — the information we collect, how we use it, third-party provision, and procedures for disclosure, correction, and deletion.
privacy.intro: anti-yt (hereinafter, the "Service") establishes the following Privacy Policy (hereinafter, this "Policy") regarding the handling of user information, including personal information, in the Service.

definition.title: Personal Information
definition.body: "Personal information" means "personal information" as defined in the Act on the Protection of Personal Information: information about a living individual that can identify the specific individual by name, date of birth, or other description contained in the information, as well as information that can identify a specific individual on its own, such as personal identification data.

collection.title: How We Collect Personal Information
collection.body:
When a User registers, the Service obtains an identifier (ID) for identifying the account through authentication with a Google account. The Service does not obtain information such as the User's name, email address, postal address, or phone number.
The Service may also obtain information generated or registered by Users in the course of using the Service (such as subscribed channels, playlists, watch history, viewing-limit settings, and usage statistics), as well as session information related to access (such as device type, approximate region, and user agent) and technical logs of operating status.

purpose.title: Purposes of Collecting and Using Personal Information
purpose.body: The purposes for which the Service collects and uses personal information are as follows:
items: To provide and operate the Service
To respond to inquiries from Users (including verifying identity)
To send necessary notices regarding new features, updates, maintenance, and important announcements of the service being used
To identify Users who have violated the Terms of Service or who attempt to use the Service for improper or unjust purposes, and to refuse their use
To allow Users to view, change, or delete their own registered information and to view their usage status
For purposes incidental to the above purposes of use

purposeChange.title: Changes to Purposes of Use
purposeChange.body:
The Service shall change the purposes of use of personal information only where it is reasonably recognized that the new purpose of use is related to the purpose before the change.
Where the purpose of use has been changed, the Service shall notify Users of the changed purpose by the method prescribed by the Service, or announce it on this website.

thirdParty.title: Provision of Personal Information to Third Parties
thirdParty.body: Except in the following cases, the Service will not provide personal information to third parties without obtaining the User's prior consent, except where permitted under the Act on the Protection of Personal Information and other laws. The Service does not sell, lend, or trade Users' personal information.
items: Where required by laws and regulations
Where necessary to protect a person's life, body, or property, and it is difficult to obtain the consent of the individual
Where particularly necessary to improve public health or promote the sound development of children, and it is difficult to obtain the consent of the individual

Where it is necessary to cooperate with a national agency, a local government, or a party entrusted thereby in performing duties prescribed by law, and obtaining the consent of the individual is likely to impede the performance of such duties
Where handling is entrusted to a subcontractor, such as a hosting provider, to the extent necessary for the operation of the Service

disclosure.title: Disclosure of Personal Information

correction.title: Correction and Deletion of Personal Information
correction.body:
Where the personal information held by the Service is incorrect, Users may request the Service to correct, add to, or delete (hereinafter, "Correction, etc.") the personal information in accordance with the procedure prescribed by the Service.
Users may export their own data and delete their account from the profile settings of the Service. Upon deletion of an account, all associated data will be erased within 30 days.
Where the Service receives a request from a User as described in the preceding paragraph and determines that it is necessary to respond to the request, it shall make the Correction, etc. of the personal information without delay.

suspensionOfUse.title: Suspension of Use of Personal Information
suspensionOfUse.body: Where the Service is requested by an individual to suspend or erase (hereinafter, "Suspension of Use, etc.") personal information on the grounds that it is being handled beyond the scope of the purposes of use or that it was obtained by improper means, the Service will conduct the necessary investigation without delay and, based on the results, carry out the Suspension of Use, etc. of the personal information and notify the individual to that effect. However, where Suspension of Use, etc. would require substantial cost or is otherwise difficult, and where alternative measures necessary to protect the rights and interests of the User can be taken, the Service will take such alternative measures.

policyChange.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
policyChange.body:
The contents of this Policy may be changed without notice to Users, except for matters otherwise provided by law or in this Policy.
Unless otherwise specified by the Service, the revised Privacy Policy shall take effect from the time it is posted on this website.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body:
For inquiries regarding this Policy, please use the contact address below.

Service name: anti-yt
Operator: brqnko
